summary: Tested tournament inline rendering feature. Backend APIs: 8/8 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Had to clear Metro cache to fix ENOENT error for deleted tournament-detail.tsx. After cache clear, home screen loads correctly with header, bottom tab bar, matchday card, performance stats. Competition switcher shows 'liga2' dropdown.

integration_issues.issue: ENOENT error for '/app/frontend/app/(tabs)/tournament-detail.tsx' was caused by stale Metro cache referencing deleted files. FIXED by deleting .expo and .metro-cache directories

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: TournamentView imported in home.tsx at line 15
VERIFIED: Conditional rendering at lines 352-356 - renders TournamentView when competitionMode === 'tournament'
VERIFIED: No references to deleted files (tournament-detail.tsx, tournament-matchup.tsx, tournament/[id].tsx)
VERIFIED: Tab layout (_layout.tsx) has no tournament tab entries
VERIFIED: my-tournaments.tsx and browse-tournaments.tsx navigate to home with tournament_id params
VERIFIED: Backend tournament APIs all return correct structure with is_registered field

success_rate.frontend: 95% - App loads correctly after cache clear, competition switcher visible

context_for_next_testing_agent: Tournaments now render INSIDE home.tsx via TournamentView component. The separate tournament pages have been deleted. Metro cache may need clearing if ENOENT errors occur for old file paths. Competition switcher shows leagues in 'LEGHE' section and tournaments in 'TORNEI' section (only visible if user has active tournament registrations). Backend tournament APIs are working: GET /api/tournaments, GET /api/tournaments/{id}, GET /api/tournaments/{id}/groups, GET /api/tournaments/{id}/my-matchups, GET /api/tournaments/{id}/bracket.
